biography: Adam DiMarco (born April 14, 1990) is a Canadian actor. He has played recurring roles in the Syfy series The Magicians (2016–2020) and the Netflix series The Order (2019–2020). He has had main roles in the HBO anthology series The White Lotus (season 2, 2022), the Prime Video series Overcompensating (2025-present), and the Netflix horror miniseries Something Very Bad Is Going to Happen (2026).
name: Adam DiMarco
